title: Workspace External Work Reconciliation
goal: Implement #458 by grouping external intent evidence freshness, closeout reconciliation, landed/open issue checks, and provider refresh metadata under one provider-agnostic external_work_reconciliation concept.
non_goals: Do not automatically close external issues.
Do not replace human acceptance review.

intent.outcome: Agents see one external-work reconciliation status before provider-specific details.
intent.constraints: Keep provider-specific refresh logic optional and keep checked-in planning state primary.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest summary/report/contract/test changes that merge the routing concept.
intent.escalation: Escalate if provider-specific assumptions would leak into core planning.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice, close #458, refresh external issue evidence, then promote the next #450 child indicated by refreshed planning state.
execution.proof: workspace/planning tests, contract tooling, ruff, maintainer surfaces, proof selector, workspace doctor

invariants: External tracker state does not override checked-in planning truth.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #459-#460 plus #467/#469/#471 remain after this slice unless validation proves they are satisfied or superseded.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #458 closeout, refresh external evidence and promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Planning summary and workspace report now expose one provider-agnostic external_work_reconciliation answer for evidence freshness, current external state, closeout reconciliation, and landed-open checks.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: promote the next #450 child after external issue evidence refresh

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Merge external evidence, closeout reconciliation, and landed-commit checks into external-work reconciliation.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep GitHub optional and provider-agnostic core evidence primary.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Whether the shared route belongs in planning summary, workspace report, or both.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A change would require provider-specific logic in core planning.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Merge related trust/reconciliation concepts instead of adding a new operating layer.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this make external-work trust cheaper to answer without increasing ordinary startup burden?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Add a provider-agnostic reconciliation summary to planning summary and workspace report, then update schemas/tests/docs.
invariants: External tracker state does not override checked-in planning truth.
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py -q
uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-external-work-reconciliation.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py docs .agentic-workspace/docs --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
completion_criteria: Agents see one external-work reconciliation status before provider-specific details.
GitHub refresh remains an optional adapter.
Landed commit evidence, external issue state, and closeout evidence can be compared through one route.
Summary can say whether external work state is fresh enough to trust.

execution_run.what happened: Added external_work_reconciliation to planning summary, planning report data, workspace report/router output, report contracts, tests, and docs.
execution_run.scope touched: planning summary/report implementation and tests, workspace report implementation/contracts/tests, external-intent evidence docs, planning README, and active planning state.
execution_run.changed surfaces: Existing summary/report/contract/docs/test/planning surfaces were updated; no provider-specific dependency or new top-level command was added.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: This slice is ready to archive and #458 can close; parent #450 remains open.
execution_run.next step: Refresh external issue evidence and promote the next #450 child.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; changes merged existing external-work trust signals through existing planning/report surfaces.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; agents now see one external-work reconciliation answer before provider-specific details.
finished_run_review.config compliance: yes; GitHub remains an optional adapter and core output is provider-agnostic.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; tests cover summary/report projection and contract schema acceptance.
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: archive #458 and continue parent #450 through remaining child issues.

proof_report.validation proof: All selected proof commands passed: workspace/planning tests, contract tooling tests/check, ruff, maintainer surfaces, planning surfaces, proof selector, root CLI authority query, and planning/memory doctor.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Combined targeted test run: 339 passed; package-local planning tests: 127 passed; contract tooling check: no drift warnings; ruff: all checks passed; maintainer surfaces and planning surfaces: ok; proof selector matched planning/workspace/CLI authority lanes; doctor health: healthy.
